summary: Inline-mode build complete. 4 sections (data-fetcher, map renderer, page shell, edge-case testing) + Integrator pseudo-node verified across 3 waves. Integrated artifact at output/integration/ (12 files, vendored Leaflet 1.9.4, no CDN refs in HTML, USGS past-day feed + OSM tiles as runtime network deps). Edge-case-testing report: 22 pass + 1 pass-with-caveat + 3 deferred-to-CV + 0 fail. Two implementation_path_chosen inline-deviations logged (dev-001 integrator output dir, dev-002 flat layout); neither alters product code or contracts. Historian log + build-summary + decision-index written. Awaiting Orchestrator-driven critic final-sweep, CV browser exercise, delivery to output/final/, and run report.
